title: I Tried Trader Joe’s New Crispy Seaweed Bugak Snack, Here’s My Honest Review as a Seaweed Lover
snippet: Trader Joe's new Korean Bugak Sticky Rice and Seaweed Crisps just hit the snack aisle. Are these new seaweed crisps any good?
